queries.question: What jazz bands were founded in 1985 and what rock bands were founded in the same year?
queries.sql:
SELECT Music_Bands.Name 
FROM Music_Bands
WHERE (Music_Bands.Genre = "Jazz" OR Music_Bands.Genre = "Rock") AND Music_Bands.Founding_Year = 1985
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?music_bands a :Music_Bands .
  ?music_bands p:name ?name .
  ?music_bands p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?music_bands p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?music_bands p:Founding_Year ?founding_year_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Jazz" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Rock")) && (STR(?founding_year_w) = "1985" || STR(?founding_year_w) = "1985.0")))
}

queries.question: List all jazz bands and also list rock bands that were founded in 1985.
queries.sql:
SELECT Music_Bands.Name 
FROM Music_Bands
WHERE Music_Bands.Genre = "Jazz" OR Music_Bands.Genre = "Rock" AND Music_Bands.Founding_Year = 1985
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?music_bands a :Music_Bands .
  ?music_bands p:name ?name .
  ?music_bands p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?music_bands p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?music_bands p:Founding_Year ?founding_year_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Jazz" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Rock" && (STR(?founding_year_w) = "1985" || STR(?founding_year_w) = "1985.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show jazz bands and rock bands founded in 1985.
